articles.relevance_reason: Directly relevant to NRC's cold storage asset class. Positive occupancy and rental rate signals for acquisitions pipeline.

articles.relevance_reason: Key indicator for NRC's Class B office portfolio. First positive absorption signal may support asset management strategy.

articles.relevance_reason: Capital markets context for NRC deal financing; private credit dynamics affect deal structuring and leverage availability.
